title: docs: update README — 2026-07-07
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by app-update-metrics.yml.)

gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest news from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the README.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page current with the latest project updates.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot pinning a news clipping to a bulletin board while Polly the bee watches, representing the automated daily news update to the README.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a tiny pixelated newspaper clipping to a wooden bulletin board. The bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny newsboy cap. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
